All whatвЂ™s left of the places of interest in this dangerous place of the Dark Valley is a long street and a deserted college. What was taught in the college is still not known for certain, but now here you can only learn how to survive. And yes!.. Be very careful at the rooftops.
All whatвЂ™s left of the places of interest in this dangerous place of the Dark Valley is a long street and a deserted college...
A very strange place. Gravitational anomalies have torn up the ground creating an alien landscape...

A very strange place. Many laugh at stalkers who claim to have seen it but it exists nonetheless. Gravitational anomalies have torn up the ground creating an alien landscape. The area is dominated by three huge towers, remnants of military hardware and floating islands of earth, ripped out of the ground.
I'm going for the artifact! Cover me!
Guarding the artifact for now. Nobody attack!
Take the artifact! I'll cover you

The Zone's anarchists. They hold that the Zone is a sanctuary of freedom and believe that all laws, rules and conventions of the outside world are void here. Their motto is "Do what you want and mind your own business." Freedom fights the government's attempts to control the Zone and is at war with the Mercenaries. Its members are equipped mainly with Soviet and Russian firearms.

These adventure-seeking cutthroats come from all over the world and welcome even the dirtiest of work. Their motto is "Money has no smell," though artifacts do indeed smell of money...Mercenaries are equipped mainly with Western firearms.

Any content purchased in an in-game store will be purchased from Sony Interactive Entertainment Network Europe Limited (вЂњSIENEвЂќ) and be subject to PlayStationв„ўNetwork Terms of Service and User Agreement which is available on the PlayStationВ®Store. Please check usage rights for each purchase as these may differ from item to item. Unless otherwise shown, content available in any in-game store has the same age rating as the game.
string.text_US: Purchase and use of items are subject to the Network Terms of Service and User Agreement. This online service has been sublicensed to you by Sony Interactive Entertainment America.

string.text:
This is the console version of S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky.
 
 In the world of the Zone, time stands still, frozen at the moment of the ChNPP catastrophe. While we've updated certain elements, some aspects that may seem controversial for us today, remain unchanged to retain the authenticity and atmosphere of the game.
 It's important to acknowledge that there are facets of the game that may not align with our current views or values. However, these unchanged elements are a part of the game's legacy, and we've chosen to maintain them as they were originally created.
 
 Any references included in the game serve to enhance the atmosphere and provide historical context within the artistic work. We hope you'll embrace the Zone and its mysteries, much like the many stalkers before you.
 
Happy hunting!
 Sincerely,
 GSC Game World Team
string.text_ps5:
This is the PlayStationВ®5 console version of S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky
 
 In the world of the Zone, time stands still, frozen at the moment of the ChNPP catastrophe. While we've updated certain elements, some aspects that may seem controversial for us today, remain unchanged to retain the authenticity and atmosphere of the game.
 It's important to acknowledge that there are facets of the game that may not align with our current views or values. However, these unchanged elements are a part of the game's legacy, and we've chosen to maintain them as they were originally created.
 
 Any references included in the game serve to enhance the atmosphere and provide historical context within the artistic work. We hope you'll embrace the Zone and its mysteries, much like the many stalkers before you.
 
Happy hunting!
 Sincerely,
 GSC Game World Team

string.text: Log in or sign up with Email
Please check your email for your code and enter it here.
Set order of loading modifications to prevent overriding files
Unable to start the game now! The mod.io manager is busy, please wait
Unable to install modification! There is no free space
There is not enough memory to install modification: \n
Waring! Installed modifications require a lot of video memory. The game might be unstable
*Recommended for Variable Refresh Rate screens. May cause screen tearing otherwise.
is not available on this platform! The mod has been unsubscribed
Talk to the leader of Duty
Talk to the leader of Duty. General Krylov may know where the entrance to the Ahroprom underground is located. That's where the stalkers who reached the center of the Zone kept a stash
The bandit camp in the tunnel must be destroyed. Bandits are using it to mount attacks on the stalker camp.
A squad of bandits is guarding one of the underground exits and helping some of their own get out onto the surface from time to time. The squad must be destroyed.
The wasteland in front of the stalker base is teeming with monsters - the area is wild and dangerous. The mutant lair must be destroyed.
The Duty base has been attacked. Help repel the attack and you will be rewarded.
The stalker base is in danger. Help stalkers fight off the attack for a reward.
You need to descend into the Ahroprom underground. The only road to the underground leads through the mutant hole

The communications of Strelok's group found in the underground stash clarify things. Strelok went to see the scientists at Yantar. Reach Yantar and talk to professor Sakharov. He may know where to look for Strelok
Duty soldiers have sealed all the underground entrances and exits shut. The only way to get into the underground is via the holes monsters use to get to the surface. You must reach the hole

Fang's PDA contained the coordinates of a stash belonging to a group of stalkers which reached the center of the Zone, prompting a disaster in the Zone. This is an important discovery because the stash may contain valuable information. You need to find the PDA in the stash
Find the map depicting the migration patterns of rare species of monsters in the Zone
Deliver the migration map to the Inquisitor
A group of stalkers is trying to reach the scientists at Yantar through the bog. Help the stalkers traverse the bog alive
Get information about the situation at Ahroprom from the outpost commander
The underground is flooded and mutant attacks against Duty should stop for a while. General Krylov will reward you handsomely for successfully completing the mission. Receive your reward from Krylov
Find information about balancing the automated parts of a machine gun
Technician Thunderov is looking for a way to increase the rate of fire of a machine gun by balancing its automated parts. He'll pay a handsome fee for related information.
Find information about modifying the gas exhaust of a machine gun
Thunderov is very close to perfecting the machine gun's characteristics. All he needs is spare time and certain technical data on gas exhausts.
Find information about pistol muzzle break
The stalker technician at Ahroprom is looking for detailed information about muzzle breaks for powerful high-caliber pistols.
Find information about pump mechanisms for combat shotguns
The stalker technician at Ahroprom is looking for information about pump mechanisms for combat shotguns.
Find information about barrel modifications for pistols
The stalker technician lacks the experience needed to modify the barrel of a powerful pistol. He'll pay for related information.
Find information about machine gun muzzle break
The Duty technician is working on an improved muzzle break for a machine gun, but he's missing some technical information.
Time to time small packs of mutants attack stalkers at the factory. Killing the monsters at their lair to the north of the factory could stop the attacks.
Return the shotgun to the Duty member

We were on a mission to clear an area of mutants the other day when we ran into a huge one. The fight lasted at least an hour and we were low on ammo but that beast wasn't even close to dying. I gave the order to retreat but stayed behind to hold the mutant back while the boys were getting clear. I fired off all my ammo and then threw my shotgun straight at the bastard. Guess what happened next? That piece of crap started eating away at the shooter and ignoring me. Bring back my shotgun, it saved my life after all!
Return the PDA with secret information

Merc, I was mugged by the bandits at the Garbage. They took everything: cash, weapons, ammo and my medical supplies. Worst of all, they took my PDA, which contained information about bandit locations at the Garbage. If I don't deliver that info to Krylov he'll bury me alive. Help me get it back!

Merc, when the mutants started appearing in the underground we had to abandon our positions and fall back. I was forced to leave my case back there with weapons, ammo, meds and my detector. I didn't have time to think about it - I had to save myself. Help me get that case back.

I had an argument with a guide over nothing much and he won't take me to see the stalkers now! He says he doesn't even want to see me again, and I don't fancy wandering around the Zone on my own. I left my shooter with the stalkers when I went to visit them last week. One of our fellas got promoted and we were celebrating that with a good dose of booze. I got pretty wasted: the boys barely managed to get me back to the barracks, but they forgot my rifle. Could you bring it back for me? I'm not much of a soldier without a weapon.

The Ahroprom underground contains a stash belonging to a group of stalkers which reached the center of the Zone. The stalkers used the stash to exchange information. You must find the stash and the PDA with communications
Emergency water dump activated. The lower levels will be flooded. Leave the flooded area

There is an old pumping station used to pump ground water in the underground. You must find the control panel for the pumping station and dump water out of the reservoirs. This will flood the underground
Destroy the mutants that are physically pressuring objects, blocking the passage way to the pump station control room.
Eliminate the potential threat at the gas station
Some dim lights have been spotted at the deserted gas station at night. Investigate the situation and eliminate any potential threat.
Follow the signal of Fang's PDA
Freedom's technician has cracked Fang's PDA frequency. You can now track Fang's movements. According to the signal Fang is currently at the Garbage. Follow the signal from Fang's PDA
Find out what happened at the outpost
It seems a Freedom outpost has been attacked yet again. Find out what happened and check for survivors at the outpost
According to information provided by the diggers, Fang went to the Dark Valley in search of the remaining components. Find Freedom's base and ask about Fang there
The commandant's PDA contains a lot of information, which can help Freedom work out who is attacking them and how they're getting into the Dark Valley. Deliver the PDA to the leader of Freedom
The mercenaries' main base has been discovered. Help Freedom destroy it. This will allow Freedom to stop the attacks and establish complete control over the Dark Valley
The PDA of one of the dead Freedom fighters is still active. Find the PDA - it may contain valuable information
The PDA of one of the Freedom fighters killed at the outpost contains a recording of a conversation between the attackers. The recording will help to identify the attackers. Take the PDA to Chekhov
Get ammo for the Freedom outpost from Ashot
Kill the pseudo-dog, which is making a nuisance of itself near the Freedom base.

The PDA at the outpost contained a recording of a conversation between the attackers. The conversation mentioned that it was the commandant who sold the information that allowed the attackers to carry out swift and unexpected strikes against Freedom patrols. Find the traitor and deliver him to Chekhov - dead or alive.
Bring the component to the technician
Bring the component to the technician
Capture and hold antennas to scan the area
Capture and hold antennas to scan the area
The commandant's buddies killed him after Freedom started looking for him. His PDA contains important information about the people he helped
You located a group of bandits inside the deserted gas station. Destroy them.
You located and destroyed a group of bandits inside the deserted gas station. Go see the barman and tell him about it.
Find information about barrels for sniper rifles
Freedom's technician, Yar, specializes in high-precision weapons. He's looking for information about barrels for sniper rifles.
Find information about an electronic stabilizer for sniper rifles
Yar the technician will pay well for detailed information about the electronic stabilization mechanism for sniper rifles.
Find information about muzzle breaks for sniper rifles
Yar the technician needs information on the workings of muzzle breaks for powerful sniper rifles. Then he'll be able to make a similar one.

There was a guy around here with a real good scope on his shooter, the kind you won't find anywhere in the Zone. I tried and tried but he didn't want to sell it to me. He left with one of our patrols headed towards the Cordon. The patrol didn't make it back, so I figure that stalker found his resting place somewhere around there. Bring me that scope, so I can give it to Chekhov as a gift - maybe he'll promote me to commandant.
Return the USB drive with movies

Help me out, bud. Me and Ganja were sitting at his place, watching a movie on his laptop when the commandant caught us and started going on about how I'm on duty and all that. He wanted to smash the laptop into pieces but we stopped him, so he took the USB drive with the movie on it and threw it over the fence, into the radioactive area. Get that drive back and Ganja will reward you.

Someone stole Serega's guitar, can you imagine that? He's the only one who can play the guitar around here, and he does it well too, unlike the rest of them. We figured out who the thief is real quick but the cocksucker hid it someplace. Bring that guitar back 'cause Serega refuses to play any other, OK?
Return the loot to the trader
Return the case with the loot to the trader
Defend the stalker base against the attack
Defend the stalker patrol near the bus stop
Interrogate Khaletskiy and find out where the case with the loot the trader needs is hidden
Find the PDA with valuable information on the soldier who died in anomalies
Return the PDA to Sgt. Lambee
Eliminate the military at the elevator
Destroy the military unit spotted by scouts at the elevator
Collect the reward from the trader. The bandits have been eliminated and the road to the base is clear
Eliminate the bandits at the deserted farmstead. This will stop them from robbing stalkers as they bring loot from the Zone to the stalker base
Eliminate the military at the depot
Destroy the military squad spotted by scouts around the depot. The squad is the main military force deployed to rescue Khaletskiy

One of my technician friends sent a fella my way with some valuable information concerning an AK upgrade on a flash drive. But the courier walked into a pseudodog lair on his way here and died. Everyone I've asked to get me that flash drive has chickened out. What about you? I promise the reward'll be worth it.

One of my technician friends sent a fella my way with some valuable information concerning a shotgun upgrade on a flash drive. But the courier walked into a pseudodog lair on his way here and died. Everyone I've asked to get me that flash drive has chickened out. What about you? I promise the reward'll be worth it.
Help the stalker fight off the pack of blind dogs
Escort the stalker to the rookie village
Receive your reward for saving the stalker from the pack of blind dogs from Wolf
Meet the digger at the Garbage
Meet the digger at the Garbage
Meet the stalkers beyond the embankment
Talk to Valerian, the stalker leader. He might know about the loot Sidorovich is after.
Your relations with the stalkers are ruined. You must regain their trust with the help of Sidorovich.
Escort Wolf's brother to the rookie village
Escort Wolf's brother to the rookie village
Find information about balancing of automated parts
Find information about balancing of automated parts for Van, the stalker technician near the Cordon.
Find information about pump mechanisms for shotguns
Using information about pump mechanisms, the stalker technician will be able to significantly increase a shotgun's rate of fire.
The stalker technician can assemble a device which would increase the accuracy of a pump-action shotgun, but he's missing some information.

There used to be a chemist here in the Zone. He wasn't a real chemist or anything but he made a "magic" vodka. It really was something... A couple of swigs and you'd forget everything: the Zone, mutants, anomalies - everything! Your fears left you and you didn't give a shit about who you were or what was happening to you. Even at the price they used to charge for that stuff, it was still worth it. Anyway, one day someone decided to poison the chemist out of jealousy or greed, who knows? They poisoned him and that put an end to the vodka supplies... But, I heard the chemist had a few stashes around the Zone and I know where one is. Bring me a bottle of that magic stuff and I'll pay you handsomely for it!

I collect rare weapons, buddy - I've got enough of them to fill a museum, but if there's one thing I'm missing that's a trophy AKM-47/2. That AK is not just a good shooter, it's a real rare piece that was used to kill mutants you ain't never seen. I heard its owner was not only a great shot, he was a legend in the Zone who could get out of any trouble and escape any anomaly... I haven't heard anything about that stalker for a while but I recently got some info about the shooter: it's hidden in a secret place that's pretty tough to get to. Bring me that shooter, merc.

Help me out, merc. I recently bought me a new, more powerful detector and threw the old one into an anomaly to celebrate. The thing is, this new detector is not bringing me much luck - it's been three weeks without an artifact. I guess this new detector is OK but I want my old one back. Bring it to me and I'll make it worth it.

Merc, an old friend of mine recently escaped the bandits at the Garbage. Those bastards made him run between anomalies at the embankment just for their amusement and the radiation levels around there are close to lethal. He can barely move now and normal rad meds are no use - he needs something stronger. I heard the army boys have special medkits that can help, so if you can get me one of those, we'd be tangibly grateful.
Defend the bandit base from the enemy attack
Bring Napr two thousand in cash when it gets dark
Buy a medkit from Wild Napr at the flea market for 2,000. Major deals like this at the flea market only take place at night.
Bring Wild Napr the old PDA
Bring Wild Napr at the flea market the old PDA, found under the false bottom of the toolbox in Freshy's destroyed camp.
Kill Stringov for leading you into an ambush.
Take over the flea market together with the bandits
Massacre the diggers at the flea market to teach the others a lesson, and make sure that one of the bandits stays there to guard it.
Take the old PDA from the toolbox
Take the old PDA in Freshy's camp to bring to Wild Napr. The PDA should be under the false bottom of the toolbox.
Take the old PDA from Freshy's camp
Take Freshy's old PDA from him at the camp to bring to Wild Napr. If Freshy is not there, take the PDA from under the false bottom of the toolbox.
Search Stringov's body and take everything valuable.
Bring Stringov 2,000 in cash to buy a batch of smuggled weapons.
Take out a guy known as Stringov
Kill a guy called Stringov per Yoga's instructions.
Take out the smuggler and diggers
Kill the smuggler and the diggers who want to buy weapons from him.
Find and destroy the creatures that hunt diggers. You can start looking at the place where they attacked the survivor's group. It is likely that they can only be found at night.
Eliminate the guards at the bandit concentration camp
Free the captives together with the digger squad after eliminating the bandit concentration camp guards.
Meet the digger squad and lead the attack on the bandit concentration camp.
Find out what important business Wild Napr wanted to talk to you about at the flea market.
Get information from the digger messenger
Talk to the digger messenger to find out where Fang went.
Find Fang in the basement by following his PDA signal.
Catch up with Fang by following his PDA signal.
Get information about Fang from the diggers
Try to find out Fang's whereabouts from the diggers he went to see, according to the trader.
Pick up the PDA that Fang dropped
Follow Fang to the Dark Valley
Follow Fang to the Dark Valley.
Kill the blind dogs that have locked in the digger messenger in the valley.
Search the digger's body for information about Fang.
Go see Tooth the trader and collect a reward for clearing the flea market.
Take the shooter from stash in the anomaly
Take the shooter Yoga talked about from the stash in the anomaly
Take the loot from the old stash used by the diggers that were freed from the concentration camp.
Demand an additional reward from Yoga for clearing the flea market.
Find information about reinforced body armor
Bring Limpid a bottle of booze and some information about reinforced army body armor. In return he may be able to install something similar on a body suit.
Find information about screening a suit

Limpid's never heard of psy-emissions, but if you provide him with all the necessary information, he could assemble and install a system on a suit that would protect the wearer against these emissions.
Find information about a closed-cycle breathing module
Limpid, the bandit technician, can make any kind of modification, but to install a closed-cycle breathing module on a suit he needs additional information.
Get back the items taken by the bandits near the flea market.

Well, here's a story: one of our fellas caught some lame digger and took him for a walk between some anomalies. They both copped it in a Gravi and I don't have a problem with that, but that fella borrowed by Chaser for the job and it's still there. If you could get it back, that would be real nice.

Hey brother, there's something you can do for me. We were sitting at Limpid's and he was making a real good shooter for some fella, all mods and shit. Well, that fella and our boss didn't get on too well, so Yoga told us to make that fella disappear. Well, we chased him into a bunch of anomalies nice and quiet, but that shooter is still there. Bring me that weapon and I'll make sure Tooth don't hold back with the reward.
Deliver a bottle of Cossacks vodka

Buddy, help me out and bring me some booze, would you? Just make sure, it's not the crap everyone else is drinking. I hid a couple of bottles of the good stuff in a decent spot but I can't go there myself right now. Go pick it up for me and make sure nobody sees you going there, OK?

A guy came here from the Cordon the other day, one of them green and annoying types. He told everyone and his dog about his magic jacket, which he claimed could withstand any anomaly. I heard that even when the bandits captured him he wouldn't shut up until they chased him into a Gravi. Well, the poor bastard was right - the jacket survived the anomaly without a scratch. I could find a use for that jacket if you could bring it to me.

Yeah, you can help me with something. I had a pistol and it was nothing special but I got it from my grandpa. I lost it in a mess...We got drunk and decided to scare the bandits during the right. When it got dark we crawled up to a camp we'd picked out during the day and started imitating mutant voices. It turned out there weren't any bandits there, and we got attacked by two bloodsuckers instead. I barely made it out alive and I even dropped my pistol back there!
Wait until the emission is over
Run to the nearest cover and hide to avoid the emission
Attention! An emission is approaching!!! Approximate time till emission:
Take the items you collected to the squad commander
You need to capture and hold the object indicated.
Hold the point until help arrives
The enemy has been spotted in this area. An attack is imminent.
The squad has been attacked by the enemy. Help the squad repel the attack
Eliminate the enemy at the control point
You can pick up your reward from the faction's trader.
Help the friendly squad get through.
Chase the enemy away from the area. This will weaken him.

The psy-field intensity at the station is off the scale, but Strelok is protected from the psy-emissions by the prototype. Incapacitating it will stop Strelok. An electromagnetic rifle can harm the prototype's electronics - use it to fire at Strelok and disable his prototype
Find the teleport that leads to the heat pipeline
The space around the station is permeated with teleports. To keep firing at Strelok you need to return to the heat pipeline. Find the teleport that leads back to it
Find a way to Chornobyl NPP
The way to Chornobyl NPP leads through the ruined hospital. Hurry - Strelok made it through the Scorcher and he's very close to the power plant. Find the entrance to the catacombs
The sniper isn't protected from this side. Kill the sniper
The hospital hall is covered by a sniper and a machine gun nest. The sniper's position is well-protected. Clear Sky will distract the enemy while you cross the hall to take the sniper out
Get to the other side of the hall

The machine gunner is unleashing hell on the lower floor while the sniper has the upper floor covered. Clear Sky will distract the enemy for a short while. Move only when given the order by the commander of the Clear Sky squad
You need to reach the bridge. Move only when given the order by the commander of the Clear Sky squad, which will distract the enemy
Cross the bridge. Move only when given the order by the commander of the Clear Sky squad, which will distract the enemy
The falling helicopter blew up the wall and opened the path into the next hall. Proceed to the next hall
The Clear Sky squad is advancing to blow up the machine gun nest. Monolithians are attacking the squad. Provide covering fire for the Clear Sky squad
A Clear Sky squad is approaching. Hold out until reinforcements arrive
Find the entrance to the catacombs
Find the entrance to the catacombs
Hold out until the Clear Sky squad arrives
Fight your way through to the catacombs entrance
Fight your way through to the catacombs entrance
Move towards the stairs to the ground floor
Help the Clear Sky squad escape enemy fire
Sneak up on the enemy sniper
Destroy the enemy at the crossroads
Destroy the enemy ambush at the crossroads

There's a real firefight going on at the crossroads. The building to the left is held by bandits. The building is a good position to clear the road ahead. Destroy the machine gun nest in the building.

The enemy has taken up defensive positions in the building on the other side of the bridge. The area on the other side of the bridge is well-covered, so well that the Clear Sky squad didn't even manage to get past the bridge. You must get through to the building and suppress enemy fire. The Clear Sky squad will distract the enemy meanwhile
Electric unit located. Deactivate the generator and cut the power to the fence
Find a way through the construction site
The suburbs of Lymansk are very close. The road there leads through an unfinished complex. Find a way through the construction site
Lebedev has given the order to scout the road through Lymansk to ensure safe passage for the main Clear Sky squad. A war has broken out on the city streets - proceed with caution
Move towards the bridge via the canal
The enemy fire is too powerful. Leave towards the bridge via the canal
Help the fighter sneak up on the sniper
Help the Clear Sky fighter sneak up on the sniper.

The path to the generator is blocked by an electric fence. The city has long been without electricity, which means the fence is being powered autonomously. The wires from the fence lead to the institute building on the right. Find the generator that powers the fence.
Power to the fence has been cut. It's now possible to come closer and eliminate the sniper. Take him down
Capture the plant used to extract anomalous substances from the bottom of the swamps.
Help the Clear Sky squad take over the guard tower held by bandits.
Repel the bandit attack on the tower
Repel the bandit counterattack on the guard tower.
Capture the farm northeast of the Swamps by taking out the bandits there.
Capture the approaches to the paths to the outside world
Secure the paths to the Cordon and Ahroprom by capturing adjacent positions.
Reinforce Clear Sky's presence at the Swamps
Reinforce Clear Sky's presence at the Swamps by eliminating enemy forces.
Go to the Cordon with the guide
Meet the guide and go to the Cordon with him.
Go to the great Swamps with the guide
Ask the guide to take you to the great Swamps.
Take over the Swamps to make the roads safe for guides.
Ask the barman about the Clear Sky base.
Ask Lebedev about what happened after the second emission.
Reach an agreement with Lebedev to help each other
Reach an agreement with Lebedev to help you leave the Swamps.
Head to the outpost with the guide
Ask the guide to take you to the outpost.
Ask Sidorovich about the stalker who was interested in strange components. It's the only clue Clear Sky has about why the Zone is being shaken by emissions
Get a set of equipment from the trader.
Respond to the help signal from the Clear Sky outpost.
Eliminate the boars attacking the Clear Sky outpost
Return to the Clear Sky base
Reach cover inside the Clear Sky base before the emission hits.
Ascend the tower to escape monsters.
The Clear Sky squad has requested a few grenades.
The Clear Sky squad is in dire need of medical supplies.
The Clear Sky squad needs shotgun shells
The Clear Sky squad needs pistol ammo
The Clear Sky squad needs assault rifle ammo

While out on a night mission a Clear Sky squad ran into a boar lair. It's probably too late to save the men, but the squad commander had a modified PMm. The pistol will be useful to the faction. Return it.

A few days ago renegades attacked a Clear Sky squad, just as they were buying a shipment of weapons from the military. Most shooters were captured by the renegades, but the best assault rifle was hidden. You need to recover it.

A Clear Sky squad received a help signal from a stalker who said that he found a rare artifact, but didn't know how to get out of an anomalous area. The squad couldn't get to him in time and the signal died. You need to get the artifact.
One of our best pathfinders has gone missing while out on a night recon mission. You need to at least return the scout's PDA to make sure the information he collected does not go to waste.

Renegades recently captured the small plant at the Swamps, just as an experiment was being conducted there. A suit was being saturated with anomalous jelly. Return the suit so that our scientists can assess the experiment.
Find information about kevlar body armor
To improve armor, Gray needs information about kevlar body armor.
Gray wants to fix up a special muzzle break, but doesn't know enough about how they work. Find the related information and bring it to him.
Gray can make a barrel attachment which would improve a weapon's characteristics, but he's missing some data.
Mercernary, stay focused! Our goal is to take control over the Swamps. If you don't know what to do, look in your PDA for active tasks.
PDA with information about the Swamps, collected by a pathfinder from Clear Sky.
Eliminate the military in the HQ building
A military squad has taken up a defensive position in the HQ building. Eliminate the military in the building
Take military cargo at the helicopter.

A patrolling military helicopter, carrying valuable ammo and weapons, crashed nearby. We need them to hold the barrier - every shooter and round makes a difference. Unfortunately, our boys can't get through to that area. The place is held by Monolithians - a hardass bunch to begin with, but they also have radiation suits, unlike us.

A few nights ago a stalker squad was attacked by a pack of hungry merciless dogs. There were no survivors. The squad commander died along with his men, but he was bringing us important information. Find the commander's body and take the PDA with the information.
One of our snipers with invaluable sniper ammo died in an anomaly. If you can return the ammo, you'll be richly rewarded.
Take the artifact from the dead stalker
One of our stalkers managed to get through an anomalous swamp, but couldn't bring a valuable artifact back out. Bring us the artifact for a reward.
Collect the artifact from the village

That village is cursed, stalker. Bloodsuckers appear out of nowhere - nobody has the guts to go there. Still, some crazy ass thrill-seekers are attracted to that place, despite the fact that the most ruthless and dangerous bloodsuckers in the Zone live there. Then again, if you manage to kill them, in the deserted house you'll find an artifact that's unlike any you'll see in the Zone

A mercenary squad managed to get out of the space bubble and is now proceeding towards the bridge by Lymansk. The advance Clear Sky squad is already at the bridge. Move out towards the Red Forest and meet with Lebedev
The barrier has been attacked again. Help stalkers defend the barrier
Eliminate the military at the base
Meet the mercenaries in the village

There's a group of mercenaries in the deserted village looking for the group that got trapped in the space anomaly near Lymansk. They can give you more details about where to get the strongest radio signal. Meet the mercenaries in the village.
Damn! Sorry, bro, this ain't my area of expertise. If anyone can help you it's Forester. They say he knows everything there is to know about the Zone.
It's good to see you. So, did you find out how to get our boys out?
Yeah, the bandit base at the Garbage is a tough nut to crack. You won't manage on your own.
Hmm...you'll need a good transmitter for that. The military had one like that...hold on, we'll think of something...

A few weeks ago we got an important order for a unique artifact. The order came from the top - the client is a real big shot. Anyway, everything was going well: our squad found the artifact somewhere near the Barrier and was already on its way back when it got hit by the large Emission. We thought they all copped it, but they got lucky and survived. Trouble is, they went missing somewhere around here. We were ordered to find them, 'cause we have to deliver on our promise. If we screw this up, no client will ever trust the mercenaries with another order again.

We pick up fragments of our squad's transmissions, but we can't make out anything from them. The only thing that's clear is that they got lost in broad daylight and are now in some sort of trap. It could be an anomaly or some new evil that's appeared in the Zone. We don't know what to do. There's an old water tower by the farmstead - I think we'd be able to receive their transmissions better up there. We've tried climbing up there before, but some real badass monster jumped out of nowhere, grabbed one of our boys and dragged him away. The rest of us barely made it out!

Are you crazy, I'm still shitting my pants from last time, and the boys won't even go near that tower. You, on the other hand, look like you know a thing or two about the Zone. You couldn't kill that beast and receive the message from our boys, could you?
A bloodsucker has been spotted around the water tower, which provides the strongest signal in the area. Kill the bloodsucker.
Meet up with the Freedom squad
Meet up with the Freedom squad
The water tower is the highest elevation point at the military warehouses. It provides the strongest signal. Go to the top of the tower and receive the signal from the lost group of mercenaries
A radio message from the lost group of mercenaries has been received by Forester via his PDA's radio channel. Return to Forester for further instructions
Meet up with the Freedom squad
Freedom is getting ready to attack the army base to drive the military out and set up their own base at the military warehouses. Help Freedom attack the army base

The base is full of soldiers keeping close watch over the transmitter. Without outside help it won't be easy to drive them out and transmit the coordinates for the mercenaries to use to get out of the space bubble. Come back to the deserted village and talk to the mercenaries again
The way to the transmitter is open. Go to the top of the tower and transmit the coordinates that Forester provided to the mercenary group that got stuck in the space bubble
Talk to the outpost commander about the situation at the military warehouses
Guard the stalkers on their way to the anomalous area
Guard the stalkers on their way to the anomalous area
Defend the stalkers in the anomalous area
Defend the stalkers in the anomalous area
The mercenaries are attacking bandits on the other side of the river. Provide covering fire and help them get in position
The bandits are too many - they're preventing the mercenaries from lowering the bridge. Kill as many bandits as possible
Cover the mercenary near the control panel
A mercenary has secured a position near the bridge control panel. Provide covering fire while the mercenary lowers the bridge
Assume a firing position on the first floor of the gatehouse. This is the most effective vantage point to fire at bandits
Eliminate the snipers on the hill
The snipers have the bridge control panel covered - with them alive the mercenaries have no chance of lowering the bridge. Eliminate the snipers on the hill
The bridge has been lowered and the road to Lymansk is clear. Talk to Lebedev
Wait until the stalker squad arrives
Wait until the stalker squad arrives

Thanks to the Compass, Forester managed to get out of a space bubble several days ago. The artifact should prove helpful once again to get the mercenaries out of their bubble. Bring Forester the Compass

Forester found a unique artifact in a space anomaly, which is very similar to the bubble that the mercenaries got themselves into near the military warehouses. On his way back, Forester was robbed by bandits and lost the artifact. Find the Compass
Forester lives in the deserted hut. He can help you find a way to get to Lymansk. Talk to Forester

The missing group's PDA had some notes about a path through the Red Forest. In its depths there is a space anomaly which leads to the old hut at the edge of the forest. That's where Forester lives. Find the space anomaly
Deliver the PDA with the map of the Red Forest
Deliver the PDA with the map of the Red Forest
The path to Forester through the Red Forest is unknown. There is a help signal coming from the Red Forest. Answer the signal
Help Clear Sky capture the bridge

A mercenary squad is approaching the bridge to Lymansk. They will come out on the bandit side of the river, so the action at that bridge will get real hot real soon. Help Clear Sky lower the bridge to Lymansk
Strelok is being covered by a group of stalkers. Eliminate the ambush
Strelok has gone into the tunnel. Go after him and make sure he doesn't advance to the center of the Zone
Strelok is somewhere very close, within 100 meters. Chase him down
Capture the old mine. That area has a high level of anomalous activity and plenty of rare artifacts
The army base has a powerful transmitter, which we can use to send a signal to the group trapped in the space bubble near Lymansk. Go to the military warehouses
Find a way to the anomalous area

The missing group's PDA had some notes about a path through the Red Forest. In its depths there is a space anomaly which leads to the old hut on the edge of the forest. That's where Forester lives. Find the space anomaly.

Forester receives unintelligible bits and pieces of radio communications from an unidentified group that got trapped in a strange anomaly very near Lymansk. The group may know an alternative way to Lymansk. Go to the military warehouses and find a place suitable for receiving a clearer signal
A dead stalker's PDA is still active. It may contain valuable information about the Red Forest. Pick up that PDA.
Bring back the PDA with a map of the Red Forest

Merc, we could use your help. We need an accurate map of the Red Forest. I heard that several groups of stalkers tried to explore the Forest but most of them vanished. Find their notes and bring them to me.
Bring back the tank machine gun

Here's a job for you. I heard from Forester that there's an old Soviet tank deep in the forest. Nobody knows how it got there, except that it appeared after the powerful emission. The thing is, the tank is pretty much intact. Sure, you couldn't drive it but you could remove the machine gun that's mounted on it. Bring me that machine gun and your efforts will be well rewarded.

There's something you can return for me. We were testing a prototype for the scientists, a small device used to measure anomaly strength. It's not much use at this stage - it took them two days just to teach us how to use it. We were collecting information in the old mine when something happened, something attacked us...all sorts of crap started flying at us and I was the only one to make it out alive. The device was left down there with the boys - they got thrown into some anomalies. That thing that attacked us is probably still down there too, so it won't be easy getting it back, but if you manage you'll get a good reward.
Don't let zombies get close to the stalkers on the roof
Cover the stalkers on the roof while they work the installation valve. Don't let zombies get near the repair squad on the roof!
Don't let zombies get close to the stalkers in the hangar
Cover the stalkers in the hangar while they work the installation valve. Don't let zombies get near the repair squad in the hangar!
As long as zombies are attacking, the doors of the scientists' bunker are blocked. Repel the zombie attack to get inside the bunker and see the scientists
Strelok has left to see the scientists at Yantar. Go to Yantar and talk to professor Sakharov. He may know where to find Strelok
The path to the Red Forest is open
The cooling station has been repaired and stabilized, so psy-emissions are at a minimum. The way to the Red Forest is safe. Go to the Red Forest - that's where Strelok is heading
Don't let the repair team die
Take the documents to Sakharov. They will help him understand why Yantar became home to such strong psy-emission levels
Fight your way through to the device
Fight your way through to the factory
The area around the factory is full of zombies. Join up with Lefty and his group to fight your way inside. Hurry - the psy-field level may become critical at any minute

A group of stalkers found important documents in the factory area. They may help Sakharov determine the cause of the powerful psy-field at Yantar. The group's signal died near the factory exit. Find the PDA with the documents
A group of stalkers is getting ready to fight their way through to the factory while the psy-emissions are at their lowest. Meet Lefty, the group's commander
Take up a position on the hangar roof
Follow the stalker onto the hangar roof
Lefty ordered everyone to assume their positions. Follow the stalker onto the roof and get in position

Help me, merc. There's an artifact in the Zone we call the Scarlet Flower. It's no use to a stalker but the ladies can't take their pretty eyes off it. I've got a date coming up and I figure I'm guaranteed to score if I can get one. That's why I'm still in the damn Zone - a flower has been spotted somewhere around here. The artifact looks like a magic flower which glows day and night. Bring me the artifact and I'll make it worth your while!

Merc, there's something I need. I lost a souvenir, which looks like a grenade...but it's not a grenade...well, it is a grenade but it's one they use for training. Anyway, get it back for me... I think I know where you can find it - I was at the factory when something happened...my brain got all messed up and I nearly forgot who I am! When I came to, I was here, so I figure that grenade must be back at the factory. Return it for me!
Area next to the railroad platform
Mercenary, this is Orest, the leader of local stalkers. If you want to talk, find me on the first floor of the main building.
Hey you! No strangers allowed, this is our turf! Will fire without warning!
Heh! Now we'll give 'em hell for sure!
Whew!... It should get easier from here.
Thanks, buddy! Now we'll knock 'em out cold!
Oh man, you really bailed us out there! Swing by the base some time for your reward.
Thanks, dude! Stop by our base and we'll show you our gratitude!
A million thanks! Next time you're in our neck of the woods, drop by our base for a reward!
That'll teach them to stay away from places they aren't invited to!
We held them off, thank God!
The only loot they got out of this camp is a few bullets in the head!
We're getting squeezed by bandits! Help us out, man, please!
We're at war with those Clear Sky bastards! Help us out and we'll pay you back!
Duty are going crazy on our asses! Help us out, or we're dead meat!
Hey, stalker! We're getting pounded by Freedom! What do you say we teach 'em a lesson together?
Help, man! The army's beating up on fellow stalkers!
We're knee-deep in monsters, man! Help!
Dude! You gotta help us kill these zombies!
They're killing our guys! Where are you?!
Soon it's gonna be too late! Help us!
...What happened? Come in. Do you read me?
Our squad ain't responding. Go to them, they might need help.
We can't establish communication with our lads. Gotta check out what's up.
Our fellas got lost someplace. Get a team ready and go find them.
Let's go and see what's up.
Roger! We're already on our way!
I bet they're doing just fine. But sure, we'll check it out.
It's game over for you chickenshits!
Cover me, boys, I'm going in!
C'mon, it's time to go and be heroes.
Get ready for action! Everyone, spread out!
Spread out, boys! We're moving out!
Spread out and get in position!
Aww, I was just about to take a nap...
I shoulda just died at birth...
Will ya ever friggin' let me finish a meal?
They told me to stay away from the Zone...
What, that's it? I was just getting warmed up.
Whew, time to relax your sphincter! It's all over!
We're the best, guys! We showed them!
We're about to have a party. Who's up for some fun?
Enemy encountered. We're about to start!
We see the enemy. Getting ready for action...
Remember, everybody: fire on my command!
Get ready. Fire on my signal!
Less initiative! Wait for my signal!
Just as we began to miss them... I see the enemy!
Hey, where are you? We're waiting...
We're still here, if anyone cares.
It ain't gonna end that easily! I'm tellin' ya.
Keep your eyes open, the enemy may be here any minute!
It could be nothing... But check your weapons just in case.
We're ready - will attack on your command!
We're all ready. Just waiting for your order!
All positions are ready, waiting on your command!
That's it, it's no use hiding anymore.
A sneak attack is no longer an option.
...Dammit, have you all gone deaf or what?
Listen up! We've lost contact with our squad. We must find out what happened.
Go there and check what's going on. The squad's not responding.
Quick, get a team together and go see what's going on! We've lost contact somehow. Be on your guard at all times!
Aye, aye, sir! Search the area and establish contact!
That's enough rest! We're moving out!
Get yourself together! We're moving out!
Dammit, not again... I've still got blood all over me from the last attack...
I'm sick and tired of these bozos.
And so the fight goes on... Cra-a-a-ptastic!
This is getting to be way past annoying.
All riiight! That's real kind of you, you know that?
Good to see you, man! We'll show them a real good time now that you're here!
Oh, brother! You really stuck up for us there! Come to our base - we'll thank you properly and maybe unwind a little, too.
If it weren't for you, we'd be wormfood by now. Pay us a visit at our base - we'll reward you with a little something-something.
We came this close to ultimate freedom from this world. Stop by our base - we owe you one.
Those who live by the AK, die by the AK. Got that, Duty?
I didn't quite get what they were trying to tell us.
The poor bastards didn't have a chance - our tactics were just too good for them.
Brother! The bandits are getting to us - we need your help!
We need your support, buddy! These damn snowmen are about to smother us.
Help, dude! Duty is coming to collect!
Dude, help us pump some jarheads full of lead!
Hey stalker! We got a wild zoo here! We won't make it without you!
Hey, bro, some stalkers are trying to take away our freedom! Help!
Dude, help us stop these zombies!
My friends are dying! Quick, help!
You forget about us?! We're dying here!
...What the hell? What's going on there?
...This ain't funny no more... I ain't kidding...
Our guys ain't coming in! Comb the area, and stay alert!
I'll be damned if I know what's going on. We have to go and see if our guys are alright.
I'm worried about our guys. Get a squad ready and search the area!
Yeah, we need to go see how our guys are doing.
Ack! I hope they're not in any serious trouble!
Come get an extra helping of lead!
Everyone get ready! We've got a job to do!
Smoke break is over! Move your asses!
That's enough suntan for you! Let's rock and roll!
Break it up - keep your distances when attacking.
Shit! Looks like I'm out of ammo...
Ha-ha-ha!! You don't... hey, you're not kidding?
Can't we wait another hour or two?
That's what happens to those who mess with Freedom.
You realized who you're dealing with, huh? Don't forget to tell your friends!
There's the enemy! Get ready to attack!
The enemy is here! Join the attack - if you're brave enough.
I see the enemy! Time to play some wargames...
Who's the trigger-happy bastard? Fire on my command only!
Sit tight! Fire on my signal!
Wait for my command! Take aim!
We took them all out. The position is ours.
The enemy is dead, we've got the location secured.
Our squad has captured the position.
Yo, dude, you with us or what?
You having fun all by yourself? What are we waiting for?
Just tell me one thing - are we free to go or you're just being slow?
My gut's telling me someone's knocking on our door!
No sleeping! They're about to come at us, I'd bet on it!
Attention! The enemy could be sneaking up on you as we speak!
My people are ready. We'll join the fight on your signal!
Everything is basically ready - we're just waiting for your command to attack.
We've assumed our positions. Waiting on your command!
Forget the element of surprise - we goofed it up!
It was a nice plan, but they nicked us!
No use hiding - we've been discovered!
Finally! What the world needs is more good guys like you!
Reinforcements have arrived! Now we'll show 'em...
Hey! I say we work together on this - you in?
Ugh... that was a close one! Thanks, man. Come by our base - Duty doesn't forget good deeds.
We'd be pushing up daisies now if not for you. Come by our base and let Duty do their duty to you.
We were this close to biting the big one! Come by our base so we can thank you properly!
We fought them off! Thanks, everybody!
We managed to hold our positions.
Don't bring a knife to a gunfight, fools.
Hey merc! Help Duty fight off some stalker rabble!
Help us, friend! Bandits are your enemies, too!
Hey, dude! We need your help with these snot-nosed punks from the Swamps!
Help us clear off that Freedom scum!
The military is putting us in a vice! We need your support or we're done for!
Hey stalker! We need your help against the Zone's spawns!
The zombies are getting to us, we need your help!
Where are you? We need your help!
We can't wait for you forever! Get over here!
Attention! We can't reach our squad - it's up to you to figure out what happened. Go.
It could be a technical problem, but my gut tells me that ain't it. We gotta check it out.
Alright, get a squad ready and move out. Our boys ain't responding.
What on earth happened there? We'll go check.
People! On your feet, double-quick time!
Yeah, anything could happen. Moving out!
Here's what I owe you - with interest!
Show them what Duty is made of! Get ready!
Check your weapons and follow the leader!
Spread out and get ready for action!
Time to answer the call of Duty, eh?
The enemy's everywhere... they keep coming... and coming... and coming...
I'm doing it for the greater good of us all... for the greater good...
Let me put my boots on at least...
I see the enemy! Anyone who wants to fight for the good cause, join in!
Enemy contact. Getting ready for an attack.
Wait... don't open fire till I say so!
Shoot before I give the command and you'll be sitting on a peg!
Keep your eyes peeled! Attack on my command!
Roger. The position is under our control.
Merc, we're waiting for your signal! Over.
Hey, everything all right with you?
Check your head sometime, aight? We got people waiting here.
How much ammo we got left? We're expecting guests.
Keep on your guard! We may get counterattacked!
Stay alert, the enemy can attack any minute now!
Our squad is ready for action. Waiting for your signal!
Fighters are in position. Just signal when!
Everything is ready! You signal when to start!
We've been detected by the enemy!
That's it, now we'll teach them a lesson!
Nice of you to come! They ain't gonna get a warm welcome now!
Thanks for coming to our help! Let's show them who's boss!
Thanks for helping out! Drop by our base some time - we'll find a way to pay you back, that's a promise!
Thanks for helping out! Come by our base when you got a minute - we'll return the favor.
Thanks, merc! You really turned it around! Your reward will be waiting for you at the base.
Man, that was some fine defensive action!
Merc, help us fight these bandits!
Duty is crushing us! Help us deal with them, man!
Hey buddy, these Freedom fighters are squeezing us real tight! Help!
Man, help us deal with the army boys!
Help us, merc! Mutants are everywhere!
Hey, man! Help us fend off some stalkers!
Get over here! The zombies are coming at us!
We can't hold on much longer! Hurry, help us!
Damn you! Where on earth are you?
Get a move on and see what's happened with our boys. They ain't responding.
We've lost contact with our guys. We must go and see what's going on.
The guys aren't responding. Something must have happened to them.
I wonder who they ran into... We're moving out.
The enemy never sleeps! Get ready!
Scatter out in a chain! Be at the ready!
Boy, am I tired of these trips.
Christ, can't I even enjoy one meal?!
Whoa! That was a nice fight, wasn't it?
Enemy spotted, getting ready to attack.
We're getting ready to attack. Join in if you like.
Here they are. Get ready for action!
Base, we've captured the target location.
You awake over there? We're waiting up for you.
C'mon man, this ain't funny. Come in.
Hey, you alive over there or what?
No resting! By the looks of things, we should be expecting visitors.
Watch for any movements. The enemy could be right on us!
Keep your guard! We're expecting an attack.
Merc, we're ready to join the action on your command!
Merc, we'll attack on your signal!
Merc, we're waiting for your signal!
We'll have to fight out in the open!
They see us! I repeat, they see us!
We, err... good of you to show up when you did!
Hey! So, how about we give them cocksuckers a damn good kicking?
Ooh! Now it's gonna get real hairy for them!
Whoa, I haven't seen anything this rough in a while... Drop by sometime - we'll give you something for your trouble.
Thanks! For a minute there I thought we were all going to meet our maker... Pop in some time at the base so we can pay you back.
I was about to give up the ghost, but hey, here we are. You oughta come see us at our base for your reward.
He came, he saw, he sucked major cock! Mua-ha-ha!
We kicked them suckers' asses good!
Consider this breakfast; now if anyone else tries the same shit, they'll be dessert!
Yo, man! Help us give Clear Sky a black eye!
You gotta help us, bro! These uptight faggots are dipping us in some stinky shit!
Those anarchist assholes are banging us hard - help!
Help us out, bro! We gotta spank some army ass!
Yo, brother! We need your help with some butt-ugly beasts!
We need you, bro! Some assholes are coming after us!
Come to us, quick! The dead are killing the living over here!
We're getting plugged over here! Are you a man or what?
We're about to croak here, bro! Get over here!
Where the hell are you?! We're getting butchered!
...You ain't all dead over there, are ya?
...Hey, brother... we ain't clear on what's going on...
Looks like our guys got lost. We gotta check it out and see what's up.
Our brothas got themselves into some kinda shit. Drag your asses over there and get a line on it.
Our homeys are laying low. Gotta take a peek and see whassup.
Ain't no thang! We'll get cracking on it!
Yeah, yeah, we're getting to it.
Get your asses up and follow me!
It's crunchtime, so crank it up!
Quit holding hands, girlies! Scamper out!
Time to nail those faggots! Spread out, quick!
Stop herding like cattle! We're about to smoke 'em!
They're getting on my nerves for real!
What the..?! Just as I was grabbing a bite!
I'm gonna put 'em all to rest!
This is just a drill, right?
We owned the losers! Hell yeah!
The suckers are out cold! Check their pockets, bros!
They made for some good porkchops, eh?
Lookie here, the little bitches actually showed up! Who's up for some ass whoopin'?
Yo, dawgs, we found some suckas to pump some lead into. Come have fun!
Yo, join up and let's waste these bitches!
Jump when I say "Jump," shoot when I say "Shoot." Are we clear?
We smoke the turds when I say so! Got that?
Fire only when I tell you!
Whoa! We got another fat cat to fleece here!
Well, smack my ass and call me Dolly! What a meeting!
The faggots are down. We got the spot now.
We wasted the sons of bitches. The area is now ours.
Holy shit, we're done! Nothing but dead bodies around.
Give it to them! Make 'em feel the pain!
Enough jacking off! Go, go, go!
Don't be slow, bro. Everything's going great, just waitin' on you.
What the hell are we doing here? It's about time to go on a rampage!
Yo, you keeping low? When are we going to war, huh?
Keep your cheeks together and your eyes peeled!
It's too early to celebrate! They're gonna come at us again!
Wipe that smile off your face! Keep on the lookout!
It's all good. Just say when!
We're in position. Just holler when you wanna start.
We're here. Give us a jingle, aight?
Holy shit! We got our picture took!
Shit! They got us down pat...
Oh crap, what the hell is that thing??
Oh crap, what the hell is that thing??
We need two of you at the valve and two of you with me! Merc, you get on the hangar roof and cover both squads.
We're at the valve and ready to begin on your order.
Valve fixed in position. Initiate activation!
Watch out, zombies to the left of the building!
Watch out, zombies by the truck!
We're doing good! Don't let up!
Great! The cooling station is working again. The psy-field is stable. It's time for us to get out of here...
You did it! My sensors show that psy-emission levels are falling! That means that the cooling station is stable. I very much hope that Yantar will become a quieter place from here on in!
Good news, professor! We're on our way back to the bunker.
Thank you, merc. By the way, I'm getting a decent signal from Strelok. It looks like he's not far from you, heading straight for the Red Forest.
Merc, your position is on the roof! Follow the stalker!
Quit wasting time, merc. Follow me!
Good, you're in position. Now hold it.
We're in position. The roof is clear. Fixing the valve in position.
Shit! Zombies are coming from all sides!
How many of them are there? They're everywhere! Aaaaa!
Aaaa! There's too many of them! Help!
We need help - provide supporting fire!
Aaaa! They're everywhere! We're going to die in here!
Zombies are trying to break into the hangar! There's too many of them!
Phew, we fought them off... It should get easier from here...
We're in the hangar! Fixing the valve in position.
How do you like some of that?
You like how that shit works?
I'm gonna give you some lead salad to chew on!
Damn! They're coming right at us!
The scientists' bunker is under attack! If you can hear us - please help!
Thanks for coming to our aid, merc! Get in position and fire at will!
Thank you for your help, merc! Zombie attacks have really increased lately. If you want to talk to the scientists, they're inside the bunker.
Howdy, merc. During the operation you do what I say, when I say, got it?
Get in position and watch the rear! You two, give 'em hell!
Dearest Lefty. I have some new data. It appears that we should be able to stabilize the psy-emissions. A young man is on his way, so please wait for him and further instructions.

Lefty, according to my data the psy-emissions are generated by an unidentified device located under the factory. The psy-field is unstable because of a malfunction in that device's cooling station. Your objective is to restart the cooling system. I have sent all the information you require to your PDA. The diagram indicates two valves used to initiate the restart. You must activate both valves. Get in position and I'll inform you when psy-emissions fall to a safe level.
Professor, we are ready to start on your signal.
Lefty, the psy-field emission level is currently at its lowest. Please begin the operation! All our hopes and prayers are with you! Good luck!

Aaaaa, my head... my head is killing me, I can't think straight!.. Ivan... attacked us all of a sudden... aaaa... the voices in my head, the damn psy-emission... at least we managed to get the documents... all we need to do is get them to Sakharov... Crap, the dogs are on our trail... I don't want to... noooooooo... oh God!
We're almost there. I repeat: our objective is to fix the 2 valves in position and restart the cooling station.
Merc, get back in position. We're dropping like flies!
We lost the squad. The device became uncontrollable. An emission is approaching! Aaaaaaagrhhhhhhhhhh!
Glad to see you, merc. We've done the impossible - we fought our way into the very center of the Zone, to the power plant, and mostly thanks to you.
Petrenko, get a scan of Strelok's PDA frequency.
Lebedev, this is the recon squad. We got a visual on Strelok.
Merc, climb onto the heat pipeline and intercept Strelok. We'll cover you from the ground.

Merc, here's an electromagnetic gun prototype. It will let you disable Strelok's psy-protection and help stop him. Without protection, Strelok won't last long under the emission. Even our own suits can barely neutralize the field. Get up close to Strelok and cut off his psy-protection.
Fire the gauss rifle at Strelok to weaken his psy-protection.
Less time wasting, more Strelok shooting.
Merc, your goal is Strelok. Move up and unload into him.
Merc, take your foot off the brake! Chase Strelok down or he'll get away.
Strelok is getting away. Do something!
Strelok's psy-protection is down to almost zero. Just a bit more, merc, and it'll be completely disabled.
Oh Mama, don't wait up for me, I shall make my new home at the bottom of the sea!
Petrovich, cover our backs, will ya?
Take it like men! Stand strong!
A man only dies once, brothers!
They're coming from the right! Whoever's there, provide support fire!
I'm low on ammo! Pull back to the anomalies!
Fellas, we're making a move - keep 'em pinned for us!
This is it, lads! My time's up! Farewell!
Someone take out that damn sniper!
I'm gonna try to flank them!
I'm hit, damn it, I'm hit!
Mosquito is no more! Assuming command!
Pick it up, fellas! Let's kill 'em dead!
Squeeze the life out of 'em! Attack!
Looks like it's over for me... Forgive me, brothers!
Anyone alive in my sector? Don't.....agrh!
Alex, you there? Come in, dammit!
Up there! That cocksucker's hiding at the top!
Where are they all coming from?
Strelok's psy-protection has been disabled - that ought to stop him. Now we just wait and see what happens...
How are the readings? Any drop in the level of anomalous activity?
Damn, I didn't expect anything like this! Anomalous activity is through the roof!
But the Zone was supposed to calm down!
Aaahhh... what's going on... my head's about to explode... aaahhh...
We let Strelok get away! He's already inside the power plant.
An emission is coming... the readings are going off the scale... everyone, find cover.... aaaahhhh!
Merc, hurry up! You're very close to Strelok!
Don't let him get into the tunnel!
Hold him until Strelok is out of the tunnel!
Merc, I blew up the tunnel. You will not stop me. I am going to reach the center of the Zone - whatever it takes.
Strelok's signal is gone. We lost him.
He went towards the Scorcher, and from there it's not far to the center of the Zone. For us, though, trying to get through the Scorcher without the scientists' prototype would be suicide!
Our only hope of catching Strelok is to go through Lymansk. I know of a tunnel that leads there - it starts just beyond the bridge...
This is the only known way of reaching the city. The bridge can only be lowered from the other side, but that's bandit territory.

Shit... there must be a way of getting across! Maybe there's another road to the other shore... Well, if anyone can help us get to Lymansk, it's Forester. They say that old timer can find safe roads through areas he's never been in. The old man's hut is on the edge of the Red Forest. Merc, find Forester.
Hello, mercenary. What brings you here?
Merc, get here, quick! Leshiy's squad is almost here!
Leshiy's squad is approaching. Our job is to cover them so they can get through to the bridge. Take up a position on the second floor of the tower and get ready!
...This is Leshiy. Our squad is approaching the bridge.
Leshiy, Lebedev here. We're looking forward to seeing you!
Attention all fighters! Let's clear a path for Leshiy! Open fire!
This is Leshiy, we've managed to secure a position next to the bridge.
We're gonna try to lower the bridge. Commander, cover us.
Private, get to the bridge control panel, now!
Soldier, run to the bridge control panel!
Private, get to the bridge control panel!
Lebedev, cover my man at the control panel! The bandits are trying to get him!
Damn it! They have snipers covering the control panel. There's no way we can lower the bridge while they're alive.
Damn it! There's a sniper on the hill! Take him out!
What the hell are you doing? Take that sniper down, now!
There are too many bandits - we can't move!
The bandits have us pinned! Try to provide supporting fire.
Lebedev, put some fire on those bandits - they won't let us move!
Merc, get back in position! We must get that bridge lowered!!!
Attention all units. Another massive emission is coming. It looks like Strelok managed to reach the center of the Zone. We failed to stop him! Get to cover, NOW! GO, GO, GO!
Thank you, Leshiy! We sure as hell owe you one!
Thank the merc. If it weren't for him we'd be stuck in that Bubble trap forever.
I'll keep that in mind! Good luck to you!

Clear Sky fighters, we have completed a brilliant operation! The bridge has been lowered and the road to Lymansk is now open. Advanced squad: move out into Lymansk and find a safe path through the city. Everyone else: hold the bridge and wait for the main squad.
Merc, get back in position right now. Leshiy's group is barely holding on. If we don't get that bridge lowered - we will fail.
Merc, follow the advanced squads into the city - your job is to find a safe road through Lymansk for the main squad. Be careful: a real war has broken out in the city.
End your pursuit now, mercenary... or you will die.

Merc, I don't have any information about a path through the Red Forest. There are many rumors about these woods, but we don't have any other option - we must find a way through the Red Forest and find Forester.
Well done, merc - you made it through the Red Forest. Forester's hut is really close.
It's been a while since I've seen someone other than monsters come out of the Forest. Well, come on over, big guy - let's have a chat.
...We can't get out of quadrant eighty four... warping... coming back...
It's been a long time since anyone's come through the Red Forest! Merc, come over here and I'll fill you in.
Wow! I'd never have guessed you'd be able deal with that bloodsucker!

If you can hear me... we're stuck in an anomaly... we can't get out... it's like space is warped... whichever way we go... can't move... equipment has gone off the rails... can see the outlines of a town on the horizon... our coordinates... 51... 10... 3... 1... 2... Is there anybody out there?
Merc, this is Forester. I've made a little diagram explaining how to get out of the Bubble. I'm sending you the coordinates. After the squad gets them, they'll be able to get out no problem.
If you want to talk, put that weapon away and come over here nice and slow.
Kostyan, this is Hog. Remember me? You better, 'cause I saved your ass a couple of weeks back.
Sure, Hog, what can I do for you?
Kostyan, I need you to help this one fella get to the antenna at the military base. I heard you're in that area, is that right?
That's right, we're trying to capture the warehouses. Come on over and we'll kick some military ass together.
Not this time, Kostyan, sorry. We can't be seen fighting the military. I can only send you one man.
One more shooter ain't never gonna hurt... we'll wait for him.
Merc, head over to Kostyan; he'll help you reach the transmitter.
Merc, we're stuck by the HQ! The army boys have holed up in there and they got this whole area covered - we can't move an inch! Help us capture the HQ!
Great, now the military base is ours! Freedom will set up a base here and close the barrier once and for all! Thanks for your help, merc. Go ahead, the transmitter is all yours.

We've received the coordinates and we're going to try to get out of the Bubble... OK, left here... sixty feet this way... Hot dang! We're free! You hear me? We made it out of the anomaly! We're heading for Lymansk!

Lebedev here. We're at the bridge, waiting for mercenaries to arrive from the direction of the bandit camp any time soon. Come back to the bridge, we need you here - it's going to get pretty nasty here before long.
Merc, the intercepted communications explain a lot. Come back to my hut - I've got an idea or two on how to get the mercenaries out of the Bubble.
Objective accomplished! The tower is under our control. Now we just need to hold it!
Merc, get to the tower and stay alert!
Enemy spotted advancing from the ruined church. Get ready!
We have the tower, now we can start clearing the path to the factory. Open your PDA and play it by ear.
Base, this is oh-one-two. I see a mercenary in the marsh. Instructions, over?
Oh-one-two, this is Base. Terminate him!
Shit! The bastard hid in the reeds! Now unless we burn the whole thing, we ain't got a chance in hell of finding him!
Oh-one-two, this is Base. Keep patrolling.
Excellent! The road to the factory is clear. Moving out.
Well done, fellas! The swamp pump is back under our control.
Cold, leave the merc alone with your dirty jokes. I need to see him.
Well, brother, if Lebedev says he needs to see you, that ain't up for discussion. Go on... I'll catch you later.
Trader, a fighter is on his way to you. Issue him with all the equipment he'll need for the mission.
Run for the tower, the monsters can't get you there!
Whew, you're right on time, bro! I'm real low on ammo, so let's make the best of it together.
Attention all fighters! An emission is approaching! Get to cover, NOW!
This is the second outpost, we're under attack, I repeat: we're under attack, help...
Merc, there are anomalies ahead, be careful! Remember, don't move until you've thrown a bolt in front of you.

Oh, by the way, you can sometimes find artifacts in anomalies. You can't see them, but detectors spot them easily enough. If you get close enough, your detector will indicate the location of the artifact. And then you just pick it up - easy as pie. Keep in mind that your current detector isn't exactly top of the line: it only shows the distance to the artifact.
Well done, men! We've reinforced our position in the Swamps enough to give the renegades a real good kicking! Our next objective is their main base!
We've captured the renegades' lair. All we need to do now is take control of the paths to the Swamps.
Shit! The renegades are stronger than us! We need to do something about that before we lose the war!
The Swamps are now under our control! Good job, boys, you did it! All squads - dig in at key positions and wait for further instructions!
The renegades managed to recapture their lair! We can't allow those bastards to live right on our doorstep. We need to smoke them out of their base, whatever it takes!
Attention, we have lost control of the paths to the Swamps. If we don't recapture them, the Swamps will become a breeding ground for scum once more!
Your main guide is the Objectives section.
Your main objective is displayed here...
Together with a selected additional objective.
There can be several additional objectives, which you can cycle through using these buttons.
Most objectives are also displayed on the map, with the exception of rare occasions when your objectives cannot be located.

We will need your help with not only destroying the enemy, but also capturing key positions. In these situations our fighters will be grateful if you provide covering fire as they capture a position. By the way, don't ignore calls for help - our boys' lives could be at stake.
Hovering over a mark on the map will display additional information.
In addition to your objectives, friendly units and identified enemies will also be displayed on the map.
OK, as I'm sure you understand, our main objective is to establish control over the Swamps, and that means a war against the aggressor.
This section allows you to access tactical information about combat operations at any time.
Information about your current faction is displayed on the left. Right now that's us, Clear Sky.
Information about the main enemy is displayed on the right.
This shows our approximate combat strength.
This shows how many fighters we have.
And this is our equipment supply.
Right at the bottom you'll find symbols indicating the special features of our combat equipment.
Similar indicators are also shown for our enemy.
Finally, this field allows you to see the current strategic mission, as well as tactical objectives that must be achieved in order to complete the strategic mission.
Completed strategic missions will be displayed at the bottom.
The last tab allows you to view your current relations with all factions, as well as each faction's combat strength.
Your personal stats are also displayed here.
We're there, so you can take your blindfold off. Don't you try to follow me, it won't work anyway! If you want to come back to the base find one of the guides at the fishing hamlet.
Home, sweet, home! Go ahead and take your blindfold off. You'll find me here when you're ready to go back to the Swamps.

Merc, it looks like you're at the Great Swamps now. Be extremely careful and don't try to be a hero. Check out your PDA - you should find the location of our squads there. I suggest you get yourself overВ to the fishing hamlet - that's where they are.
Excellent, merc - you are in Lymansk. There's a real war going on, so be very, very careful. Help the advanced squads find a safe path through the city.
Shit! We're under fire and taking casualties! We need help ASAP!
Merc, come over here - I'll fill you in. And keep your head down!

Man, this is some mess I'm in. There's a real street war going on here. There's an MG nest on the balcony of the building to the left. They're not holding back up there - we're totally pinned. If we can take out the machine gunner we'll be able to keep going. I'll draw his attention and you head into the building and deal with that MG. Go on my signal.
What the hell are you waiting for? Go, go, go!
This is Captain Serov, leader of the Clear Sky squad. We are approaching the intersection. Hold on, merc, we're coming to help.
Enemy down! Merc, make your way over here and I'll fill you in.

We need to move further into the city. Our boys are stuck by the canal beyond the square and we're on our way to help them. You seem to know how to handle yourself - why don't you stick with us and make things easier for us both?
They're attacking from all sides! Take up defensive positions!
Dammit, how many are there? They're coming from all directions! Merc, keep moving towards the canal; we'll hold the enemy!
Merc! Get out of here, now! Don't waste your ammo.
Commander, we're under enemy fire! Requesting help.

You couldn't have picked a better time to show up, merc. WeвЂ™re stuck here in a terrible position. The enemy is in the building across the canal and we're sitting ducks here! Lebedev ordered us to take the bridge. We need to clear and secure that building, whatever it takes!
The enemy is in the building on the other side. We're sitting ducks here - there's no point in attempting an attack, we'll just die for nothing.

We'll keep them busy so that you can run from cover to cover and get right up to the building. Once you're there you know what to do - just kill that bastard machine gunner! These assholes have caused us enough grief.
Oh and merc - keep it cool. Move from cover to cover and only on my command!
The emplacement is out of action! Let's move!
Take up positions in the building. You couldn't ask for a better strategic spot.

Thanks for your help, merc! We'll stay here and keep an eye on the bridge until the main squad arrives. You need to keep moving. According to the map, we're very close to the edge of Lymansk. The coordinates are on your PDA.
The exit from Lymansk is very close, but we need to stay alert and proceed with caution.
Sniper in the tower! Take cover!
Vasilenko, close in and smoke that sniper out! Go!
Damn, those bastards have put up a fence, and even got power running through it!
The town has no electricity supply. That means there must be a generator around here somewhere supplying that fence with power.
The cables lead into the building to the right. Merc, we'll distract the sniper so you can get inside the Institute building and shut down that generator!
Great, the power to the fence has been cut. Advance.
Lebedev, the enemy has been eliminated! Awaiting further orders!
Lebedev, we have the bridge. Let's hope they don't try to recapture it.
Captain Serov reporting! We fought off the attack. The road is clear.

Good job! The main squad is ready to move through Lymansk. Advanced squad: your objective is to find the entrance to the Prypiat underground. The entrance is at the old hospital on the edge of Lymansk. The coordinates are on your PDA.
Let's go and check it out.
I didn't expect to see bandits here. Let's take 'em all down.
Don't shoot! I can tell you about the bandits' ambush.
Spill the beans and we might spare your life.
Gimme a medkit for my partner.
You'll have to do without. You have one minute. Tell me where the ambush is or I'll shoot you like a dog.
The ambush is really close. Here, let me mark it on your PDA.
You may live, but don't let me catch sight of you ever again.
